name: Immune
description: Temporarily immune to a specific ability (e.g. Guidance, Battle Medicine, Tell Fortune). Applied automatically on use and cleared when the game clock passes its expiry.

name: Aid
description: +2 circumstance bonus to the next attack roll or save (Aid critical success: +3).

name: Aid (Critical Success)
description: +3 circumstance bonus to the next attack roll or save.

name: Antidote
description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves against poisons (Lesser; Moderate antidote is +3). The bonus is conditional ('vs poison'), so it is shown as a reminder beneath the Fortitude save rather than netted into the always-on number. Lasts 6 hours.

name: Antiplague
description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves against diseases (Lesser; Moderate antiplague is +3), including the daily save against a disease's progression. The bonus is conditional ('vs disease'), so it is shown as a reminder beneath the Fortitude save rather than netted into the always-on number. Lasts 24 hours.

name: Avoiding Notice
description: Successful Stealth check at start of exploration — Hidden from creatures that haven't noticed you.

name: Beacon Shot
description: Embedded with a sparking beacon shot for 1 minute. An invisible creature becomes merely hidden to creatures who couldn't otherwise see it, and a concealed creature loses the concealed condition. Remove with an Interact action and a DC 20 Athletics check.

name: Bless
description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation.

name: Blood Booster (Greater)
description: Resistance 20 to persistent bleed and persistent poison damage; lower the flat-check DC to end persistent bleed or poison as if aided. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Blood Booster (Lesser)
description: Resistance 5 to persistent bleed and persistent poison damage; lower the flat-check DC to end persistent bleed or poison as if aided. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Blood Booster (Moderate)
description: Resistance 10 to persistent bleed and persistent poison damage; lower the flat-check DC to end persistent bleed or poison as if aided. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Bagpipes of Turmoil (playing)
description: +1 item bonus to Performance checks and to Intimidation checks to Demoralize while playing the bagpipes.

name: Bagpipes of Turmoil (playing)
description: +2 item bonus to Performance checks and to Intimidation checks to Demoralize while playing the bagpipes.

name: Drums of War (playing)
description: +1 item bonus to Performance checks and a +5-foot status bonus to Speed while playing the drums.

name: Drums of War (playing)
description: +2 item bonus to Performance checks and a +5-foot status bonus to Speed while playing the drums.

name: Entertainer's Lute (playing)
description: +1 item bonus to Diplomacy and Performance checks while playing the lute.

name: Entertainer's Lute (playing)
description: +2 item bonus to Diplomacy and Performance checks while playing the lute.

name: Trickster's Mandolin (playing)
description: +1 item bonus to Deception and Performance checks while playing the mandolin.

name: Trickster's Mandolin (playing)
description: +2 item bonus to Deception and Performance checks while playing the mandolin.

name: Pipes of Compulsion (playing)
description: +1 item bonus to Diplomacy and Performance checks while playing the pipes.

name: Pipes of Compulsion (playing)
description: +2 item bonus to Diplomacy and Performance checks while playing the pipes.

name: Cognitive Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society, and Recall Knowledge checks; –2 item penalty to weapon/unarmed attack rolls, Athletics, and Acrobatics. Carrying capacity drops by 2 Bulk. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Cognitive Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society, and Recall Knowledge checks; –2 item penalty to weapon/unarmed attack rolls, Athletics, and Acrobatics. Carrying capacity drops by 2 Bulk. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Cognitive Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society, and Recall Knowledge checks; –2 item penalty to weapon/unarmed attack rolls, Athletics, and Acrobatics. Carrying capacity drops by 2 Bulk. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Cognitive Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, Society, and Recall Knowledge checks; –2 item penalty to weapon/unarmed attack rolls, Athletics, and Acrobatics. Carrying capacity drops by 2 Bulk. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Defend
description: Moving at half Speed with your shield raised: +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to detect hazards. You cannot be surprised, and can use Shield Block while traveling.

name: Devoted Guardian
description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC while your guardian stays adjacent with their shield raised.

name: Devoted Guardian (Tower Shield)
description: +2 circumstance bonus to AC while your guardian stays adjacent with their tower shield raised.

name: Dirge of Doom
description: Enemies in range are Frightened 1 (no save). Manual — apply Frightened via conditions.

name: Roll the Plates
description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering melee attack (Dragon Turtle Plate reaction).

name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +5 item bonus to AC and +2 item bonus to Perception, with a −1 item penalty to Will and Reflex saves and a Dexterity cap of +2 (all netted into the sheet; the cap composes with your armor's, lowest wins). The −1 penalty to Recall Knowledge checks is shown as a reminder on each Recall-Knowledge skill. You can burn the remaining duration to Stride twice (1 action).

name: Eagle-eye Elixir
description: +1 item bonus to Perception (Lesser; Moderate elixir is +2). The greater +2/+3 bonus to find secret doors and traps shows as a conditional reminder — an extra +1 on top of the netted Perception bonus. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Charged (Eld)
description: Off-guard against attacks that deal electricity damage (still descriptive — no AC-vs-type surface) and −2 to saves against electric effects (now shown as a reminder beneath each save). Ends when the encounter ends, on taking electricity damage, or by Discharging to empower another electric Eld power.

name: Rust Cloud
description: A 20-foot emanation of billowing rust: creatures inside are concealed, and creatures outside are concealed to those inside. Lasts 10 minutes, until Dismissed (2 actions), or until you fall unconscious.

name: Shrouded
description: All light within 20 feet is lowered one step in intensity (bright → dim, dim → darkness). Lasts until the end of your turn.

name: Feather Fall
description: You take no damage from the fall and land upright. Lasts 1 minute or until you stop falling, whichever comes first.

name: Fly (spell)
description: Character gains a fly Speed equal to their land Speed. Track manually.

name: Gecko Potion
description: +1 item bonus to Climb and to Palm an Object (shown as conditional reminders on the Athletics and Thievery cards), and you can cling to surfaces. Lasts 5 minutes.

name: Harrow Casting — Key
description: +1 status bonus to AC and all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Harrow Casting, Key drawn).

name: Harrow Casting — Key (omen match)
description: +2 status bonus to AC and all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Harrow Casting, Key drawn matching the Keys omen).

name: Harrow Casting — Star (omen match)
description: +2 status bonus to all saving throws until the start of the caster's next turn (Harrow Casting, Star drawn matching the Stars omen).

name: Heroism (Rank 1–3)
description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

name: Heroism (Rank 4–6)
description: +2 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

name: Heroism (Rank 7+)
description: +3 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

name: Ichthyosis Mutagen
description: Your skin thickens into scales: you gain fast healing 2 and automatically succeed at flat checks to recover from persistent bleed. The flaking skin imposes a –2 penalty to Reflex saves and grants creatures a +4 circumstance bonus to Track you for 24 hours. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Blood Magic — AC (Imperial)
description: +1 status bonus to AC until the start of your next turn (Imperial blood magic).

name: Blood Magic — Saving Throws (Imperial)
description: +1 status bonus to all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Imperial blood magic).

name: Inspire Courage
description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls while the composition lasts.

name: Inspire Courage (+2)
description: +2 status bonus to attack rolls (Maestro dedication or Lingering Composition).

name: Juggernaut Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 30 temporary Hit Points; –2 item penalty to Will saves, Perception, and initiative. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Juggernaut Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 5 temporary Hit Points; –2 item penalty to Will saves, Perception, and initiative. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Juggernaut Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 45 temporary Hit Points; –2 item penalty to Will saves, Perception, and initiative. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Juggernaut Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves and 10 temporary Hit Points; –2 item penalty to Will saves, Perception, and initiative. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Mage Armor
description: +1 item bonus to AC (unarmored only in practice). Lasts until next daily prep.

name: Ommatophoric Mutagen
description: Your eyes extend on prehensile stalks: +2 item bonus to visual Perception checks, all-around vision (you can’t be flanked), and low-light vision. You take a –2 penalty to saves against effects with the visual trait. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Empty Dreams
description: +1 item bonus to saving throws against dream- and nightmare-themed effects (including midnight milk); you have no dreams. Lasts 8 hours.

name: Potion of Flying (Standard)
description: You have a fly Speed of 40 feet. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Quicksilver Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Acrobatics, Stealth, Thievery, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based (ranged/finesse) attack rolls, plus a +15-foot status bonus to Speed; –2 item penalty to Fortitude saves, and you take damage equal to twice your level that can’t heal while active. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Quicksilver Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Acrobatics, Stealth, Thievery, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based (ranged/finesse) attack rolls, plus a +5-foot status bonus to Speed; –2 item penalty to Fortitude saves, and you take damage equal to twice your level that can’t heal while active. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Quicksilver Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Acrobatics, Stealth, Thievery, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based (ranged/finesse) attack rolls, plus a +20-foot status bonus to Speed; –2 item penalty to Fortitude saves, and you take damage equal to twice your level that can’t heal while active. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Quicksilver Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Acrobatics, Stealth, Thievery, Reflex saves, and Dexterity-based (ranged/finesse) attack rolls, plus a +10-foot status bonus to Speed; –2 item penalty to Fortitude saves, and you take damage equal to twice your level that can’t heal while active. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Runic Body
description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls (from fundamental rune bonus on unarmed attacks).

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves (+4 against disease, poison, or fatigue effects). Whenever you take piercing or slashing damage you take 1d6 persistent bleed. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves (+2 against disease, poison, or fatigue effects). Whenever you take piercing or slashing damage you take 1d6 persistent bleed. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves; a success against a disease, poison, or fatigue effect becomes a critical success. Whenever you take piercing or slashing damage you take 1d6 persistent bleed. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Sanguine Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude and Reflex saves (+3 against disease, poison, or fatigue effects). Whenever you take piercing or slashing damage you take 1d6 persistent bleed. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Serene Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Will saves, Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival (+4 to Will vs mental effects); –1 to attack rolls and offensive spell DCs, and –1 per damage die to your weapon, unarmed, and spell damage. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Serene Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Will saves, Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival (+2 to Will vs mental effects); –1 to attack rolls and offensive spell DCs, and –1 per damage die to your weapon, unarmed, and spell damage. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Serene Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Will saves, Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival (+5 to Will vs mental effects); –1 to attack rolls and offensive spell DCs, and –1 per damage die to your weapon, unarmed, and spell damage. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Serene Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Will saves, Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival (+3 to Will vs mental effects); –1 to attack rolls and offensive spell DCs, and –1 per damage die to your weapon, unarmed, and spell damage. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Shield (spell)
description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Shining Guidance
description: You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the limned creature while it stays limned (Izzy's Shining Guidance, #225). Conditional ('vs limned target') — it surfaces as an opt-in toggle in the attack resolver, applied to the target you choose. Applied to the party automatically when Shining Guidance's save resolves to anything but a critical success; lasts until the end of your next turn (two rounds on a critical failure — re-apply if needed).

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance; –2 item penalty to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society, and you become untrained in one trained skill of your choice. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance; –2 item penalty to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society, and you become untrained in one trained skill of your choice. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance; –2 item penalty to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society, and you become untrained in one trained skill of your choice. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Silvertongue Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance; –2 item penalty to Arcana, Crafting, Lore, Occultism, and Society, and you become untrained in one trained skill of your choice. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Soothing Tonic (Greater)
description: Fast Healing 5 for 1 minute.

name: Soothing Tonic (Lesser)
description: Fast Healing 1 for 1 minute.

name: Soothing Tonic (Major)
description: Fast Healing 10 for 1 minute.

name: Soothing Tonic (Moderate)
description: Fast Healing 3 for 1 minute.

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Greater)
description: Your body calcifies: resistance 10 to physical damage except bludgeoning. Your Speed drops by 10 feet (minimum 5) and you take a –2 penalty to Reflex saves. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Lesser)
description: Your body calcifies: resistance 5 to physical damage except bludgeoning. Your Speed drops by 10 feet (minimum 5) and you take a –2 penalty to Reflex saves. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Stone Body Mutagen (Moderate)
description: Your body calcifies: resistance 5 to physical damage except bludgeoning. Your Speed drops by 10 feet (minimum 5) and you take a –2 penalty to Reflex saves. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Theatrical Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to Acrobatics, Crafting, and Performance and a +10-foot status bonus to Speed; your untrained skills function at your level instead of +0. –1 item penalty to Perception and Will saves, and you become off-guard unless you spend an action each round on Interact, Perform, Step, or Stride. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Theatrical Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to Acrobatics, Crafting, and Performance and a +5-foot status bonus to Speed; your untrained skills function at your level instead of +0. –1 item penalty to Perception and Will saves, and you become off-guard unless you spend an action each round on Interact, Perform, Step, or Stride. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Theatrical Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to Acrobatics, Crafting, and Performance and a +10-foot status bonus to Speed; your untrained skills function at your level instead of +0. –1 item penalty to Perception and Will saves, and you become off-guard unless you spend an action each round on Interact, Perform, Step, or Stride. Lasts 1 hour.

name: Theatrical Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to Acrobatics, Crafting, and Performance and a +5-foot status bonus to Speed; your untrained skills function at your level instead of +0. –1 item penalty to Perception and Will saves, and you become off-guard unless you spend an action each round on Interact, Perform, Step, or Stride. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Trackless Emanation
description: Your vanishing tracks extend to a 20-foot emanation for 8 hours, affecting up to 10 creatures of your choice within the area. You can Dismiss this effect.

name: Treat Poison
description: +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the poison being treated.

name: Treat Wounds Immunity
description: Cannot be healed by Treat Wounds or Battle Medicine from the specific healer who applied this effect. Applied automatically on a successful Treat Wounds or Battle Medicine check. Remove to allow re-treatment.

name: Upstage
description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn.

name: War Blood Mutagen (Greater)
description: +3 item bonus to attack rolls with a chosen melee weapon (bound to your hand) and +3 item bonus to Will saves against fear. The weapon resists being removed (DC 30 Athletics) and you must succeed at a DC 5 flat check to use concentrate actions. Lasts 1 hour.

name: War Blood Mutagen (Lesser)
description: +1 item bonus to attack rolls with a chosen melee weapon (bound to your hand) and +1 item bonus to Will saves against fear. The weapon resists being removed (DC 25 Athletics) and you must succeed at a DC 5 flat check to use concentrate actions. Lasts 1 minute.

name: War Blood Mutagen (Major)
description: +4 item bonus to attack rolls with a chosen melee weapon (bound to your hand) and +4 item bonus to Will saves against fear. The weapon resists being removed (DC 30 Athletics) and you must succeed at a DC 5 flat check to use concentrate actions. Lasts 1 hour.

name: War Blood Mutagen (Moderate)
description: +2 item bonus to attack rolls with a chosen melee weapon (bound to your hand) and +2 item bonus to Will saves against fear. The weapon resists being removed (DC 30 Athletics) and you must succeed at a DC 5 flat check to use concentrate actions. Lasts 10 minutes.

name: Waterbreathing
description: You can breathe underwater. Lasts 1 hour.
